title: v2 api: stats improvements
body:
This PR includes a series of commits to:
* Clean up.
* Comment the code.
* Fix errors and perform rigorous error checks instead of ignoring some.
* Enable the libpod endpoint (uses the generic one).
* Expect that the container is running and error out otherwise.
